idea-plugin.name: Run Claude Code Cmd Any Where
idea-plugin.description:
Run Claude Code CLI commands in any directory with a right-click menu.

  • Right-click on any directory/file in Project View to run commands
  • Customizable command presets in Settings → Tools → Run Claude Code Cmd Settings
  • Support multiple execution modes: IDE Terminal or External Terminal window
  • Default command: "Run Claude Here" with claude --permission-mode bypassPermissions
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Initial release:

  • Right-click menu integration in Project View
  • Customizable command presets with displayName, command, shellType, executeMode
  • Support Terminal (IDE built-in) and Dialog (external terminal) execution modes
  • Auto shell detection for Windows/Mac/Linux
